title: Cryptool officially launches with referral programme and portfolio tools live
content_html:
Cryptool is officially live.

The platform is open at app.cryptool.io. Three things are available from day one:

  • Account creation and full onboarding for new users
  • The referral programme, paying revenue share on every successful referral with no cap on the number of referrals
  • The portfolio and investment toolkit for individual investors and fund managers

Anyone who joined the early supporter list can register on the platform using the same email they originally signed up with, and their account is upgraded automatically. If you need to change your email, get in touch with support.

This is the start of the public Cryptool platform. Bigger releases are already in the pipeline.
author: Cryptool
